void-navy.$description: Void Navy — Page canvas and primary dark surface — the base layer everything else floats on

deep-indigo.$description: Deep Indigo — Card surfaces, raised panels, and secondary structural fills

inkline-violet.$description: Inkline Violet — Hairline dividers, card borders, icon strokes — the structural skeleton color

quartz-lavender.$description: Quartz Lavender — Secondary text, outlined link borders, muted body copy, inactive navigation

mist-lilac.$description: Mist Lilac — Tertiary text and supporting UI elements needing softer contrast

dusk-iris.$description: Dusk Iris — Muted borders, disabled states, low-priority card outlines

glacier-white.$description: Glacier White — Light-theme card surfaces, light section backgrounds, high-contrast text on dark

pure-white.$description: Pure White — Primary headlines, primary text on dark, nav and button borders

pulse-cobalt.$description: Pulse Cobalt — Primary action buttons, active states, key icons, brand signal — the single vivid accent that powers the entire interface

signal-teal.$description: Signal Teal — Secondary accent for icons, tertiary links, gradient terminal, and data-viz highlights

cyan-teal.$description: Cyan Teal — Decorative gradient origin and atmospheric illustration accent

gradient-teal-blue.$description: Gradient Teal-Blue — Hero gradient banner, brand transition washes — teal flowing into cobalt creates a continuous energy signal

times.$description: Times — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

plain.$description: Primary interface typeface. Weight 100 for large display and heading sizes (42–147px), weight 300 for body, weight 400 for emphasized inline text. The ultralthin weights are the defining signature — no other fintech brand runs 100-weight at this scale. Substitute: Inter (light/extra-light), Neue Haas Grotesk Display Thin, or Untitled Sans Light.

plain-light.$description: Long-form body copy, description paragraphs, and card detail text. Weight 300 keeps long passages airy and scannable against the dark canvas. The 1.80 line-height variant is used for spacious paragraph blocks. Substitute: Inter Light, Untitled Sans Light.

plain-ultralight.$description: Subheadings, section headers within cards, and product category labels. Weight 100 at 28px stays in the same whisper register as the display sizes but at a scannable mid-scale. Substitute: Inter ExtraLight, Neue Haas Grotesk Display Thin.

plain-ultrathin.$description: Hero headlines, display text, and section-leading titles. Weight 100 at 147px is the brand's most extreme typographic move — the characters nearly dissolve into hairlines, which is why the vivid blue accent and surrounding negative space carry so much of the visual weight. Substitute: Inter Thin, Neue Haas Grotesk Display Thin.

void-canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Page-level background, the deep-space base layer

deep-indigo-card.$description: Surface level 1: Card and panel surfaces sitting on the void canvas

light-content-surface.$description: Surface level 2: Light-theme content cards, dashboard mockups, and section inversions
